name: Runpoint: AI Business Transformation Podcast
description: Hosted by Runpoint Partners’ founders Sam Gaddis (tech entrepreneur & AI builder) and Matthew Hall (PE operator & growth strategist), Runpoint Podcast strips the hype from artificial intelligence and shows you how to turn it into concrete business results—fast.

recent_episodes.title: 2025 AI Recap & 2026 Predictions: Winners, Losers, and What's Actually Working
recent_episodes.description:
Happy New Year! In this episode, Matthew and Sam break down what actually happened in AI during 2025 and make predictions for what's coming in 2026.

We cover the biggest winners and losers, the apps and tools that changed how we work, who to follow for smart AI takes, what surprised us most, and where we think things are headed.

Key topics:
• Why companies that stayed curious won 2025
• OpenAI's fall from dominance to a three-horse race
• Claude Code and why it changed ev

recent_episodes.title: Episode 10 | Unlock AI Savings: R&D Tax Credits for Builders
recent_episodes.description:
Learn how to save on your AI initiatives. On the Runpoint podcast, hosts Matthew Hall and Sam Gaddis welcome Ari Salafia, CEO and founder of TaxTaker. We explore how operator-engineers can claim R&D tax credits to ship working AI systems and significantly reduce development costs.

Chapters:
00:00 Welcome Ari Salafia of TaxTaker
01:00 Understanding R&D Tax Credits: TaxTaker's Mission
02:30 Why Businesses Should Care About R&D Tax Credits Now
04:30 What You Stand to Gain: Key

recent_episodes.title: Episode 9 | The New AI Reality: ROI, Browser Wars & Vanishing Software Value
recent_episodes.description: Matthew Hall and Sam Gaddis break down the latest in AI, challenging the "95% failure" narrative with new ROI data and dissecting ChatGPT's "Atlas" browser launch. They codify emerging best practices for AI workflow automation, advise on navigating the crowded AI coding assistant market, and celebrate AI's power to enable entirely new work. The episode culminates in a crucial discussion on the diminishing value of software in acquisitions and what truly constitutes a moat in the age of AI.

score_reason: Strips AI hype for concrete business results with PE/growth focus—ideal match for Andreas's practical approach to AI in traditional industries.

key_themes: Practical AI implementation for non-tech businesses and operators
ROI measurement and avoiding the 95% AI project failure trap
AI tools, workflows, and automation that actually ship results
The intelligence economy and competitive advantage through data
enrichment.relevant_episode: Episode 7 | AI Fluency for Private Equity: From Zapier's Framework to Real-World Tools — Perfect match because Andreas bridges the PE operator mindset (Matthew's world) with traditional industry transformation, showing how to build AI fluency across functions beyond tech.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How traditional, non-tech industries (food, agriculture, commodity boards) are actually adopting AI and winning—the 'say-do gap' between what enterprises claim they're doing with AI and what's actually moving the needle on their P&L.
enrichment.suggested_hook: Most AI guests are technologists. Andreas built and sold Canada's largest food marketing agency by making agricultural commodity boards trust data over gut instinct—here's how non-tech operators actually win with AI.
